nodes.label: Optimistic cookie check (full auth in server)
nodes.norm_label: optimistic cookie check (full auth in server)

nodes.label: Enum options & ID labels (single source of truth)
nodes.norm_label: enum options & id labels (single source of truth)

nodes.label: Badge
nodes.rationale: CVA-variant primitive using radix Slot for asChild and cn() utility

nodes.label: Button
nodes.rationale: CVA-variant primitive with variant+size; radix Slot for asChild; buttonVariants reused by pagination

nodes.label: Card
nodes.rationale: Plain div-based composite, cn() only, no Radix

nodes.label: Checkbox
nodes.rationale: Wraps radix-ui Checkbox primitive

nodes.label: Command
nodes.rationale: Built on cmdk; CommandDialog composes Dialog primitives

nodes.label: Dialog
nodes.rationale: Radix Dialog overlay primitive; uses Button in footer

nodes.label: DropdownMenu
nodes.rationale: Radix DropdownMenu overlay/portal primitive

nodes.label: Form
nodes.rationale: react-hook-form wrapper; composes Label and radix Slot

nodes.label: Input
nodes.rationale: Native input, cn() only, no Radix

nodes.label: Label
nodes.rationale: Wraps radix-ui Label primitive; consumed by Form

nodes.label: Pagination
nodes.rationale: PaginationLink reuses buttonVariants from Button

nodes.label: Popover
nodes.rationale: Radix Popover overlay/portal primitive

nodes.label: RadioGroup
nodes.rationale: Wraps radix-ui RadioGroup primitive

nodes.label: Select
nodes.rationale: Radix Select overlay/portal primitive

nodes.label: Separator
nodes.rationale: Wraps radix-ui Separator primitive

nodes.label: Sheet
nodes.rationale: Aliases radix-ui Dialog as SheetPrimitive; overlay primitive

nodes.label: Skeleton
nodes.rationale: Plain div with cn() only; no Radix, no React import

nodes.label: Toaster (Sonner)
nodes.rationale: Wraps sonner Toaster; uses next-themes; no cn(), no Radix

nodes.label: Switch
nodes.rationale: Wraps radix-ui Switch primitive with size prop

nodes.label: Table
nodes.rationale: Native table elements, cn() only, no Radix

nodes.label: Tabs
nodes.rationale: Radix Tabs primitive plus CVA tabsListVariants

nodes.label: Tooltip
nodes.rationale: Radix Tooltip overlay/portal primitive
